refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined productivity target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR included specific measurement units ('m³/h' or 'ton/h'), which are implementation details related to how productivity is quantified. To keep the FR solution-neutral and focused on the problem domain, the measurement units are omitted. The FR is atomic as it expresses a single obligation: supporting achievement of the productivity target.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through operational testing and data collection that the NGHE solution enables meeting or exceeding the customer-defined productivity target over the agreed evaluation period.

candidate_dps: Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback
Enable adaptive task scheduling to optimize workflow
Implement automated resource allocation based on productivity data
Facilitate integration with customer-defined productivity targets and reporting systems
selected_dp.selected_dp: Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP focuses on monitoring and feedback, which can be modular and independent from other system functions, minimizing coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely data to measure productivity
Risk that productivity targets may change requiring DP flexibility
Assumes that feedback mechanisms effectively influence productivity
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider refining the DP to explicitly include adaptability to changing productivity targets and integration with operational policies to ensure alignment with safety and worksite constraints.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The NGHE Solution module encompasses the overall system responsible for managing and delivering productivity monitoring and feedback functionalities.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time data streams from vehicle and other sensors for productivity analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends feedback and task updates to operators based on productivity monitoring.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates communication between NGHE Solution and remote components for data exchange and feedback delivery.

module_containment_scores.notes: High cohesion as productivity monitoring and feedback is a core function of NGHE Solution; minimal diffusion outside this module.
Vehicle generates telemetry data but does not process or provide feedback; containment is weak and diffusion high.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control, not productivity monitoring; would cause high diffusion.
Safety Services unrelated to productivity monitoring; containment very weak and diffusion very high.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary for implementing real-time productivity monitoring and feedback because it centralizes data processing, analysis, and feedback delivery, minimizing diffusion and maximizing cohesion.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from Vehicle module.
Feedback delivery may require coordination with Teleoperation and Tasking interfaces, risking interface complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP 'Provide real-time productivity monitoring and feedback' directly addresses the FR of supporting achievement of the customer-defined productivity target by enabling monitoring and feedback mechanisms necessary to meet or exceed the target.

diffusion_risks: Potential dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from Vehicle module.
Feedback delivery coordination with Teleoperation and Tasking interfaces may increase interface complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module shows high cohesion (containment score 9) and low diffusion (diffusion score 2), indicating that the DP is well contained within a single IM boundary. Other modules have low containment and high diffusion, supporting the choice of NGHE Solution as the implementation boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible as the NGHE Solution module receives real-time telemetry data and provides feedback, enabling measurement of productivity against the target during representative operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The ownership candidate 'NGHE Solution' clearly aligns with the DP, centralizing data processing and feedback delivery, minimizing diffusion and clarifying responsibility.

recommended_revisions: Explicitly document interface protocols and timing requirements with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to mitigate risks of interface complexity and ensure timely data and feedback exchange.
Consider monitoring and managing dependencies on external modules (Vehicle, Teleoperation) to reduce risks related to data accuracy and feedback coordination.
Include acceptance criteria related to interface performance and data integrity to strengthen verification of the implementation module.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed successfully, indicating that the current functional requirement is well addressed by the design parameter and implementation module. The NGHE Solution module shows high cohesion and low diffusion, and verification feasibility and allocation clarity are confirmed. Although there are some interface complexity and dependency risks, these are manageable through recommended revisions and do not warrant further decomposition at this stage. Given the high safety criticality, maintaining a clear and contained implementation boundary is preferable to avoid unnecessary complexity.

revise.why: To explicitly document interface protocols and timing requirements with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules, and to include acceptance criteria related to interface performance and data integrity to mitigate identified risks and strengthen verification.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module can reliably receive and process real-time telemetry data.
Interface protocols with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules can be clearly defined and managed.
Verification methods are sufficient to measure productivity against the target during representative operations.
open_risks: Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from Vehicle module.
Feedback delivery coordination with Teleoperation and Tasking interfaces may increase interface complexity.
evidence_needed: Detailed interface protocol documentation and timing requirements.
Acceptance criteria for interface performance and data integrity.
Verification test results demonstrating productivity monitoring effectiveness.
